name: Morocco 2026 away kit
description: The Morocco 2026 away kit by Puma was released on March 24, 2025. Featuring a white base, the shirt includes a V-neck collar with red and green trim, reflecting the colors of the Moroccan flag. A subtle gold geometric patterned strip, inspired by traditional Moroccan culture, runs vertically down the center of the kit.

name: Real Madrid 25-26 Away Kit
description:
Design Inspiration: The Adidas Real Madrid 2025-26 away shirt is inspired by the nighttime facade of the Santiago Bernabéu stadium, featuring a dark navy blue color with silver logos and light-volt accents.
Template and Features: The kit utilizes the Tiro 25 design with a Teamgeist collar and includes a subtle line design reminiscent of the Bernabéu’s facade, along with a Bernabeu stadium graphic.

name: Morocco 2026 home kit
description: The Morocco 2026 home kit by Puma will be worn during the 2026 FIFA World Cup. It features a striking red base, complemented by bold green accents on the sides and sleeve cuffs. A distinctive green pattern details the collar and the sleeve cuff trim.

name: AS Roma 2025-26 home kit
description:
Home Kit Release: AS Roma has officially released their 2025-26 home kit, drawing inspiration from the club’s jerseys of the early 1990s.
Adidas Elite Team Status: AS Roma’s new status as a local Elite team means that the Adidas AS Roma kit is available in an authentic version for the first time.
Design and Colors: The Adidas A.S. Roma 25-26 home jersey features a dark red color with orange logos and side trims, reminiscent of the 1992-94 home shirt and based on the Adidas Tiro 25 Teamwear shirt.

name: Real Madrid 25-26 Home Kit
description:
Kit Design: The Real Madrid 2025-26 home kit is primarily white with yellow piping, light gray applications, and black logos, paying homage to the 2009-10 and 2015-16 seasons.
Inspiration: The kit’s design is inspired by the transformation of the Bernabéu stadium and evokes memories of Cristiano Ronaldo’s debut season in 2009-2010, as well as the 2015-16 Champions League-winning season.

name: Inter Milan 2025-26 home kit
description:
Kit Design: The Inter Milan 2025-26 home kit features the team’s classic black and blue colors with a unique striped design inspired by the word “INTER”.
Unique Features: The kit includes turquoise blue logos for the Nike Swoosh and club crest, and the black stripes are designed to display the word “INTER”.
Availability and Price: The Nike Inter Milan 2025-2026 home jersey has been available since June 5 and retails for 150 EUR.

name: Liverpool 25-26 Home Kit
description:
Adidas and Liverpool Partnership: Adidas and Liverpool have revealed their 2025-2026 home and away kits, beginning their partnership after Nike’s five-year deal ended.
Liverpool 25-26 Home Kit: The Liverpool 25-26 home shirt features a ‘Strawberry Red’ color with white logos, similar to the 2006-2007 kit, and includes red shorts and socks.

name: Olympique Lyon 25-26 Away Kit
description:
Kit Unveiling: The 11Teamsports store has revealed Lyon’s 2025-26 away kit, showcasing Adidas’ design for the club’s away games next season.
Design Features: The Adidas Olympique Lyon 2025-2026 away shirt has a dark navy blue base with thin, alternating red and brighter blue vertical pinstripes.
Accent Details: The kit includes an overlapping v-collar with red trim, mirrored on the sleeve cuffs, and an inscription inside the collar that reads “FIERS DE NOS COULEURS” (Proud of Our Colors).

name: Milan 2025-26 home kit
description:
Monochrome Logo: The Milan 2025-26 home kit introduces a monochrome club crest, marking the first time in the club’s history that a single-color badge is used on the home jersey.
Design: The Puma Milan 2025-26 home shirt features the traditional red and black vertical stripes, along with a subtle embossed devil pattern throughout the design.
Kit Completion: The AC Milan 2025-26 home kit is completed with black shorts and black socks.

name: FC Barcelona 2025-2026 home kit
description:
Design: The FC Barcelona 2025-2026 home kit features the traditional red and deep blue vertical stripes with a gradient effect, creating a unique transition between the colors towards the center.
Logos and Details: All logos on the Barça 25-26 home kit are yellow, and the upper back of the shirt includes a small flag combining the club colors with the colors of the Catalan flag.
Availability and Pricing: The Nike FC Barcelona 2025-26 home shirt is available since July 2 and retails for 150 EUR.
